SPARQL query over doremus:
```sparql
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?work WHERE { ?work rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), "mozart")) . ?work a efrbroo:F22_Self_Associated_Work . }
```
